name: @epistery/wiki
description: Decentralized wiki with IPFS storage and epistery authentication
author: Epistery

tools.name: wiki_read
tools.description: Read a wiki page by its document ID. Returns the page content in markdown.

page.description: Document ID - a WikiWord using only letters, numbers, and underscores (min 3 chars). Examples: "Home", "BedfordStreet", "FAQ_Page"

tools.name: wiki_write
tools.description: Create or update a wiki page. The id is a WikiWord document identifier (letters, numbers, underscores only, min 3 chars). The title is a human-readable display name. Content should be markdown.

page.description: Document ID - a WikiWord using only letters, numbers, and underscores (min 3 chars). Examples: "NewYorkHistory", "AboutUs", "FAQ_Page", "Chicago"

_pid.description: Parent Document ID. Used to organize documents

tools.name: wiki_list
tools.description: List all wiki pages. Returns titles and metadata.
